name: ReportSnapshotRestatementAndDeletion
description: Immutable retained report identity, explicit predecessor relationship, ordered difference evidence, and metadata-only deletion history.
schema_def: ReportSnapshot {snapshotId: ULID, reportId, canonicalReportPayload, payloadFingerprint, reportSchemaVersion, analysisRequestFingerprint, sourceFingerprint, policyFingerprint, createdAt, actor, reason}.
RestatementLink {childSnapshotId unique, predecessorSnapshotId, createdAt}; one predecessor per child; parent may have multiple surviving children.
RestatementDifference {sourceChanges[], policyChanges[], exactMetricChanges[], stateChanges[], explanationChanges[], attentionChanges[]}; stable section and item ordering; no unrelated source rows.
DeletionEvent {deletionEventId: ULID, deletedSnapshotId, predecessorSnapshotId?, deletedAt, actor, reason, dependencyResult, idempotencyOutcomeRef}; no amount, explanation, or report content.
Delete is RESTRICTed while any surviving child references the target. Leaf deletion removes payload and outgoing link atomically and retains the event. No automatic expiry.
